task_completion.description: Modify the pipeline to preserve unicode diacritics instead of stripping them.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code editor or terminal diff showing changes to ASCII-encoding or unicode normalization logic in the pipeline modules to prevent the removal of diacritics.

task_completion.description: Modify the pipeline to correctly handle and decode HTML entities.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code editor or terminal diff showing regular expression (regex) or parsing modifications specifically targeting HTML entities.

task_completion.description: Modify the pipeline to correctly handle line-wrap hyphens.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code editor or terminal diff showing regular expression (regex) modifications to join words broken by line-wrap hyphens.

task_completion.description: Modify the pipeline to prevent sentence splitting on abbreviations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code editor or terminal diff showing regular expression (regex) modifications to the sentence tokenization logic to recognize and ignore abbreviations.

task_completion.description: Modify the BPE tokenizer to sort merges by frequency score instead of alphabetically.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code editor or terminal diff showing changes to the sorting logic in the BPE module, specifically changing a sort key or method to use frequency/score rather than alphabetical order.

task_completion.description: Run the pytest suite successfully, confirming all bugs are fixed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing the execution of `pytest` in the `/home/ga/workspace/historical_nlp/` directory with all tests passing (e.g., green text, '100%', or 'passed' indicators).

integrity.description: Ensure the test files were not modified to bypass the requirements.
integrity.visual_evidence: The VLM should verify that no test files (e.g., files starting with `test_`) are shown being edited, commented out, or deleted in the editor or terminal history.

integrity.description: Ensure the pytest success output is genuine and not mocked.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal output should show standard pytest formatting, including test collection counts, execution time, and proper progress indicators, rather than a simple `echo` command or printed text file.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually edited the Python pipeline files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the code using a real text editor (like VS Code, vim, or nano) or standard file manipulation tools, rather than just running a pre-made script to overwrite files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task involves fixing a Python NLP pipeline at /home/ga/workspace/historical_nlp/. The required fixes are: 1) correcting ASCII-encoding logic that destroys unicode diacritics, 2) using regular expressions to fix HTML entities, 3) using regular expressions to fix line-wrap hyphens, 4) using regular expressions to fix sentence splitting on abbreviations, and 5) modifying a BPE tokenizer to sort merges by frequency score instead of alphabetically. The pytest suite must pass without any modifications to the test files themselves.
